About

SEGMENT 02

BBA graduate (2023–2026) from A.V. College of Arts, Science & Commerce, Osmania University, Hyderabad. I work at the intersection of business analysis, data analytics, and digital marketing.

Over the past year at Tamada Media, I managed content operations for YINT TALKS — a Telugu-language YouTube podcast that grew from 80K to 140K+ subscribers with 48M+ total views across 238+ episodes.

Alongside that, I've independently built a full analytics and BA portfolio — financial modeling in Excel and SQL, Power BI dashboards, BPMN process mapping, BRD documentation, and Agile Scrum project management. I hold HackerRank SQL certifications at Basic, Intermediate, and Advanced levels, all earned in a single sitting.

I spent 3 years as an NSS volunteer through the length of my degree, taking part in 20+ charity and community programs at the college, city, and state level — work that built the leadership and cross-team coordination skills I now bring to project execution.

Currently targeting: entry-level roles in Business Analysis, Data Analytics, or Digital Marketing in Hyderabad.

Projects & dashboards

SEGMENT 04
SQL · POWER BI · DAX · BRD · BPMN

Fintech / UPI Payment Failure Analysis

Full BA lifecycle project: BRD with MoSCoW prioritization, 4-stage BPMN swimlane process map across PSP app, NPCI switch, and remitter/beneficiary banks, SQL aggregation across a 200-row dataset, and a Power BI dashboard with a DAX-authored Success Rate measure.

93.33% success rateRs. 800Cr+ at risk5 root causes
View dashboard ↗
AGILE · JIRA · POWER BI

Agile Podcast Operations Tracker

Designed a full Agile Scrum system from scratch for a live podcast production team — 36 tasks across 3 two-week sprints, 102 story points, with a Power BI sprint dashboard tracking episode CTR, YouTube views, and sprint velocity alongside Jira burndown and cumulative flow reports.

100% sprint completion−30% cycle time−65% follow-up delay
View dashboard ↗
POWER BI · EXCEL

Marketing & Product Performance Dashboard

Net-profit-focused interactive dashboard built from a large complex dataset, identifying the top 10 profit drivers and linking marketing spend directly to AOV and CSAT across a Campaign Performance view and a Product & Customer Insights view.

$130.4M revenue trackedTop 10 profit drivers2.50 avg CSAT
View dashboard ↗
EXCEL · PIVOTS · SLICERS

Employee Analytics Dashboard

Interactive Excel HR dashboard covering department-wise headcount, location-wise workforce distribution, monthly hiring trends, and salary analysis — with slicers and a timeline for self-serve filtering.

10 employees tracked3 locations
